allow: Bash(php -d memory_limit=512M bin/console theme:change ElfbarTheme "Elfbar B2B" --no-compile)

Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql@8.0/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u root shopware_elfbar -e "SELECT LOWER\(HEX\(navigation_category_id\)\) AS nav_root, LOWER\(HEX\(navigation_category_version_id\)\) AS nav_ver, LOWER\(HEX\(language_id\)\) AS lang FROM sales_channel WHERE id = UNHEX\('019f13524da77379ab90b62ff73c5f74'\);")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql@8.0/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u root shopware_elfbar -e "SELECT ct.name, LOWER\(HEX\(c.id\)\) AS id, LOWER\(HEX\(c.parent_id\)\) AS parent_id FROM category c LEFT JOIN category_translation ct ON ct.category_id = c.id AND ct.category_version_id = c.version_id ORDER BY c.parent_id IS NULL DESC, ct.name;")
Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql@8.0/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u root shopware_elfbar -e "SELECT LOWER\(HEX\(id\)\) AS lang_id, name FROM language;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql@8.0/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u root shopware_elfbar -e "SELECT LOWER\(HEX\(language_id\)\) lang, name FROM category_translation WHERE category_id = UNHEX\('019f13521cce7171a2647ea97bca4e74'\);")
Bash(npx --yes --package @playwright/cli playwright-cli click "text=Ja, ich bin über 18")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql@8.0/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u root shopware_elfbar -e "SELECT LOWER\(HEX\(id\)\) as id, tax_rate, name FROM tax; SELECT LOWER\(HEX\(id\)\) as id, iso_code FROM currency WHERE iso_code='EUR'; SELECT LOWER\(HEX\(language_id\)\) FROM language l JOIN locale lo ON l.locale_id=lo.id WHERE lo.code='de-DE';")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql@8.0/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u root shopware_elfbar -e "SELECT LOWER\(HEX\(ct.category_id\)\) as id, ct.name FROM category_translation ct JOIN language l ON ct.language_id=l.id JOIN locale lo ON l.locale_id=lo.id WHERE lo.code='de-DE' AND ct.name IN \('ELFBAR ELFX','ELFBAR MAX','ELFA Podsystem','ELFBAR 800','ELFBAR CR600','ELFBAR T600','Lost Mary','LIQUID','ELFLIQ'\);")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql@8.0/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u root shopware_elfbar -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as product_count FROM product; SELECT product_number FROM product WHERE product_number LIKE 'ELF-%';")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql@8.0/bin/mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u root shopware_elfbar -N -e "SELECT LOWER\(HEX\(ct.category_id\)\) FROM category_translation ct WHERE ct.name='ELFBAR ELFX' LIMIT 1;")
